---
title: "Research"
---

My research examines [broad framing of your research agenda — 1–2 sentences that 
give a reader a clear sense of what you study and why it matters].

::: {.section-title}
Working Papers
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Paper Title]
**[Co-author(s), if any]**

[1–2 sentence abstract or description. What is the question? What do you find?]

[<a href="#">Draft available upon request</a>]
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Paper Title]
**[Co-author(s), if any]**

[1–2 sentence abstract or description.]

::: {.tag}
Under Review
:::
:::

::: {.section-title}
Works in Progress
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Project Title]

[Brief description of the project, data, or method.]

::: {.tag}
Data Collection
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
### [Project Title]

[Brief description.]

::: {.tag}
Early Stage
:::
:::

::: {.section-title}
Research Interests
:::

- [Substantive area 1, e.g., Political Behavior]
- [Substantive area 2, e.g., Inequality & Redistribution]
- [Methodological interest, e.g., Causal Inference, Survey Experiments]
- [Regional focus, e.g., Latin America]
